philosophy: Concentrated, high-conviction investing in structurally dominant businesses with durable TAM and compounding Free Cash Flow. Deliberately willing to underperform 1-year to capture multi-year IRR. Tiger Cub DNA: research-intensive, long-horizon, concentrated in quality tech/consumer growth.
gross_net_style: 40-60% Long-Biased Net — structural long tilt maintained through cycles

factor_exposure.value_vs_growth_label: Growth-Quality Bias — FCF yield required but secular growth is primary screen
factor_exposure.value: High — FCF yield is primary screening metric
factor_exposure.quality: Extreme High — balance sheet strength is non-negotiable
factor_exposure.momentum: Agnostic — explicitly ignored in position sizing

sector_concentration: High — top 5 positions frequently represent 40-60% of AUM; TMT-heavy

risk_constraints.forced_liquidation_trigger: Thesis invalidation ONLY — price alone never triggers a sale

preferred_instruments: Long-dated LEAPS for leverage on high-conviction thesis

historical_regime_behavior.q4_2018_rate_hike: Absorbed 15-18% paper drawdown. Added to MSFT and AMZN at December 2018 lows as systematic sellers created dislocation.
historical_regime_behavior.march_2020_covid: Deployed substantial cash reserves into structural growth equity. Largest 30-day deployment in fund history.
historical_regime_behavior.q3_2022_inflation: Held core book through -35% technical drawdown in quality growth. Added to META at $95.

macro_reaction_function: Absorbs systemic panic systematically. VaR-constrained capital (Quant, Pod) forces mechanistic liquidation of structurally sound assets. Fundamental Tiger steps in as liquidity provider — accumulating core thesis positions at discounted valuations.

fidelity_score.match_breakdown: High Horizon Cohesion. Fundamental Tiger's logic (FCF-driven, 3-5 year horizon) is the most verifiable because their positions are concentrated in large-cap US equities, making SEC 13F filings 95% accurate to their real risk book. Behavioral AI matches investor letter rhetoric almost perfectly.

projected_30d_portfolio.logic: Aggressively absorbing Quant/Pod forced liquidation vacuum; FCF thesis remains intact.
Cloud revenue CAGR deceleration is priced in; structural multiple floor reached.
Minor reduction in credit exposure to fund equity accumulation.
